title: A Cone-preserving Solution to a Nonsymmetric Riccati Equation
summary: In this paper, we provide the following simple equivalent condition for a nonsymmetric Algebraic Riccati Equation to admit a stabilizing cone-preserving solution: an associated coefficient matrix must be stable. The result holds under the assumption that said matrix be cross-positive on a proper cone, and it both extends and completes a corresponding sufficient condition for nonnegative matrices in the literature. Further, key to showing the above is the following result which we also provide: in order for a monotonically increasing sequence of cone-preserving matrices to converge, it is sufficient to be bounded above in a single vectorial direction.
